case_title: MABEL AUYEUNG VS. KHIN THIDA KYAW KHAING

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00- SERVED JAN-07-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KYAW KHAING, KHIN THIDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY BURMESES INTERPRETER---SAI SAM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AUYEUNG, MABEL AS TO DEFENDANT KYAW KHAING, KHIN THIDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUYEUNG, MABEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KYAW KHAING, KHIN THIDA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KYAW KHAING, KHIN THIDA
